scripts.install:all: npm --prefix server install && npm --prefix client install
scripts.dev:clean: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$ports = @(3000,5000); foreach ($port in $ports) { $matches = netstat -ano -p tcp | Select-String (\":$port\") | Select-String \"LISTENING\"; $pids = @(); foreach ($m in $matches) { $parts = (($m.Line -replace '^\\s+', '') -replace '\\s+', ' ').Split(' '); if ($parts.Length -ge 5) { $pidVal = [int]$parts[4]; if ($pidVal -gt 0 -and $pidVal -ne $PID) { $pids += $pidVal } } }; $pids = $pids | Sort-Object -Unique; foreach ($id in $pids) { try { Stop-Process -Id $id -Force -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Host \"Freed port $port by stopping PID $id\" } catch { Write-Host \"Could not stop PID $id on port $port\" } } }"
scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c cyan,magenta "npm --prefix server run dev" "npm --prefix client run dev"
scripts.dev:fresh: concurrently -n server,client -c cyan,magenta "npm --prefix server run dev" "npm --prefix client run dev:fresh"
scripts.build: npm --prefix server run build && npm --prefix client run build
scripts.typecheck: npm --prefix server run typecheck && npm --prefix client run typecheck
scripts.ci:check: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm --prefix server exec -- npx prisma validate
